name: E2Gold Inc.
summary: E2Gold Inc., a mineral exploration company, focuses on the identification, acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada. The company primarily explores for gold, and other minerals and metals. Its flagship asset is a 100% beneficial interest in the Hawkins gold project with 518 contiguous single cell mining claims; and an option to acquire a 100% interest in 400 contiguous single cell mining claims and 19 boundary cell claims totaling approximately 19,478 ha located in Ontario, Canada. The company was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
